heading: Feasibility studies; acceleration; advancement of costs by non-Federal sources
label: 1962d–6 Feasibility studies; acceleration; advancement of costs by non-Federal sources
text: The Secretary may accelerate feasibility studies authorized by law when and to the extent that the costs of such studies shall have been advanced by non-Federal sources.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Water Resources Planning Act which comprises this chapter.
